Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName '\\''System'\\'' -MaxEvents 50 | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '\\''WSL|HyperV|vmwp'\\'' } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, Message | Format-List')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName '\\''System'\\'' -MaxEvents 100 | Where-Object { $_.Message -like '\\''*WSL*'\\'' -or $_.ProviderName -like '\\''*WSL*'\\'' -or $_.ProviderName -like '\\''*Hyper-V*'\\'' } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, ProviderName, Id, Message | Format-List')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName '\\''System'\\'' -MaxEvents 500 | Where-Object { $_.Level -le 3 -and \($_.Message -like '\\''*WSL*'\\'' -or $_.ProviderName -like '\\''*WSL*'\\'' -or $_.ProviderName -like '\\''*Hyper-V*'\\''\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, ProviderName, Id, Message | Format-List')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName '\\''Application'\\'' -MaxEvents 500 | Where-Object { $_.Level -le 3 } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, ProviderName, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "if \(Test-Path 'C:\\Windows\\Minidump'\) { Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Windows\\Minidump' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-Table Name, LastWriteTime, Length } else { 'No minidump directory' }")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-ChildItem $env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp -Filter '\\''*.dmp'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-Table Name, LastWriteTime')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName '\\''System'\\'' -MaxEvents 1000 | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -like '\\''*Hyper-V*'\\'' -and $_.Level -le 3 } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, ProviderName, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\shaos\\AppData\\Local\\Packages\\MicrosoftCorporationII.WindowsSubsystemForLinux_8wekyb3d8bbwe' -Recurse -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 | Format-Table Name, LastWriteTime, Length")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-ChildItem $env:TEMP -Filter '\\''*wsl*'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -ProviderName '\\''lxss-manager'\\'' -MaxEvents 50 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName '\\''Application'\\'' -MaxEvents 1000 | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 1001 -or \($_.ProviderName -eq '\\''Windows Error Reporting'\\''\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(400, $_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-ChildItem '\\''$env:TEMP\\wsl-crashes'\\'' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Format-Table Name, LastWriteTime, Length')
